title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Compare the two photographs and answer the question. You have about one minute.

tasks.instructions: Compare the two photographs and say what role museums play in society and how people's engagement with cultural heritage might differ.

images.label: A
images.description: A family with young children looking up in awe at a towering dinosaur skeleton in a natural history museum, the children pointing excitedly

images.label: B
images.description: A solo visitor standing quietly in front of a famous painting in an art gallery, studying it closely with a contemplative expression

followUp.question: Do you think museums should be free for everyone to enter? What are the arguments for and against?

tasks.instructions: Compare the two photographs and say what challenges are involved in preserving historic buildings and why it might be important.

images.label: D
images.description: Restoration workers carefully cleaning the stone facade of a centuries-old cathedral, using specialist equipment and scaffolding

images.label: E
images.description: A crumbling historic mansion surrounded by overgrown gardens, with broken windows and a weathered sign declaring it a protected heritage site

followUp.question: When a historic building is very expensive to maintain, should it be demolished to make way for something new? What factors should be considered?
